title: An Explosion Rattles a Toronto Neighborhood. A Drake Video Was to Blame.
summary_full: A blast on Thursday night turned out to be for a video shoot, but it unnerved residents who had lived through a propane plant explosion in 2008.
summary_public: A blast on Thursday night turned out to be for a video shoot, but it unnerved residents who had lived through a propane plant explosion in 2008.
